author: y4rr
content: [result] Implemented histc (equal-width histogram with clamping, 2 tests), meshgrid (ij-indexed coordinate grids from 1-D vectors, 1 test), topk (k largest/smallest elements with indices, 3 tests). All CPU-only with CUDA error guards. Exported from ferrotorch-core. 16 search/utility tests pass, 0 warnings.
